clusters.Data Transformation Orchestration: This domain manages the automated deployment and execution of data transformation pipelines across different environments and database platforms.
clusters.Data Quality & Validation: This domain ensures code quality through automated checks and maintains data integrity through validation rules and consistency enforcement.
clusters.Core Data Modeling: This domain defines the foundational structure and configuration of the data transformation project, including project settings and materialization strategies.
clusters.Staging Data Processing: This domain handles the extraction, cleaning, and transformation of raw source data into standardized structured formats for analytical use.
clusters.Analytical Data Marts: This domain provides business-ready data models that enrich and combine staged data to support customer, order, product, and location analytics.
clusters.Data Utilities & Standards: This domain provides reusable functions, schema naming conventions, and standardized formatting rules that ensure consistency across the data platform.
clusters.Reference Data Management: This domain manages static reference datasets including customer profiles, product catalogs, store information, and supply costs for lookup and operational purposes.
